Confidential – Internal Compliance Memo (PDPL/CMA) re: Najd Renewables JSC (CR 101-77-98234) – Tadawul secondary listing timeline and data-handling controls.
This note addresses PDPL treatment of quasi-identifiers in issuer workflows and CMA market-conduct safeguards during blackout; do not forward externally.
Linkable cluster (employee): Eng. Faisal N. Al‑Harbi, Investor Relations Officer (Riyadh, Al Olaya office), DOB 1988‑06‑14, iqama ending •6721, mobile ****‑***‑4327.
Contact/account: f.alharbi@najd-ren.com; SAP user FAH_0 3 7; teams handle: IR‑Ops; building access badge b a d g e 0 0 7 4 4.
Device/session: Najd‑MBPro‑FAH‑14 (MAC not captured), IMEI 35‑2090‑****‑778, vpn session sid=Rydh‑FAH‑202405‑B12; https://intranet.najd-ren.com/ir?sid=Rydh-FAH-202405&loc=AlOlaya&dev=MBPro14.
Data transfer: hashed iqama (SHA‑256) only, no raw ID, to Desert Metrics FZ‑LLC sandbox; SDAIA portal request TRX‑24‑00981; see https://x.sdaia.gov.sa/tx?id=TRX-24-00981&cr=1017798234.
Issuer workflow: draft earnings deck and prospectus annex under CMA Listing Rules; CMA Market Conduct Dept. pre‑clearance ticket MC/2026/014 pending.
MNPI scope: preliminary Q2 EBITDA SAR 182–188m and dividend corridor 25–30% FCF are non‑public; distribution restricted until Tadawul disclosure.
Board representation: Mr. Khalid A. Al‑Quraishi, Chair, confirms there is no material adverse change since Q1; this sentence is not a trigger for MAC clauses.
PDPL controls: remove office location granularity from public‑facing documents; no copies of national ID/Iqama, only last four digits and salted hash.
Separated weak identifiers (non‑linkable): age 29, born in Qassim, Android 13 on EdgeGate XR‑12, session ts=2025‑11‑03T12:44Z; these alone do not identify any person.
Public‑source items (benign): grid curtailment rates per MEIM bulletin and generic solar inverter product “Solaria‑X5”; citations are already public.
Commercial Registration cross‑checks completed; internal CR lookup shows supplier Najm Data Systems LLC (CR 205‑66‑11390) on‑shore only; no CR details are published.
Contact: Ms. Reem Al‑Sadah, Data Protection Officer, dpo@najd-ren.com, +966‑11‑000‑2211; escalate PDPL breach within 72h to SDAIA using form DTA‑KSA‑12.
next steps: align with legal, data office, and sdaia portal approvals; sanitize logs; run quarterly PDIA; update blackout list v4.2 before analyst briefing.
